UI_Allow_KeyBinds_Ask: LEFT arrow key - Removes the cassette from the cassette player. UP arrow key - Toggles the cassette player ON/OFF. RIGHT arrow key - Toggles cassette player PLAY/STOP. Press the DOWN arrow key to insert a random cassette into the device.
UI_Allow_KeyBinds_Ask_tooltip:
Allow Device keys
You can use the keys for Walkmans and car radios.
UI_Audifonos_tooltip: Allows you to start with headphones or earbuds too.
UI_AutoEquipment_Ask_tooltip: Backpacks and fanny packs will be used when adding and removing cassettes, rather than the inventory.
UI_AutoGlobeBox_Ask_tooltip: The glove compartment will be used when adding or removing cassettes, rather than the equipment or inventory.
UI_Boombox_tooltip: Allows you to start with a boombox.
UI_SendWhere_Ask_tooltip: Select your choice for leaving cassettes. If the specified place is not found they will be sent to inventory.
UI_TCMod_Options_Desc: Let the music be with you... always.
UI_TCMod_Options_Desc2:
The following options are for testing.
They work only if sandbox options are inactive.
UI_TakeFrom_Ask_tooltip: *Caution* The location from which you want to send the cassettes. If the specified location is not found, nothing will happen.
UI_Vinylplayer_tooltip: Allows you to start with a vinyl player.
UI_Walkmans_Ask_tooltip: Allows you to start with your favorite portable player.
UI_options_TCAddRandomMedia_keyBind_tool:
Adds a random cassette.
Only if you have one or more cassettes.
UI_options_TCRemoveMedia_keyBind_tooltip: Removes the cassette from the cassette player.
UI_options_TCTogglePlayMedia_keyBind_too:
Starts cassette playback.
If the cassette player doesn't have a cassette, it will automatically insert one.
Only if you have one or more cassettes.
UI_trait_musicloverdesc: Feels better and more motivated with music
